fields.summary: Queue Ordering policy changes for ordering auto created leaf queues within Managed parent Queues
[Umbrella] Capacity Scheduler: Support Auto Creation of Leaf Queues While Doing Queue Mapping

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Queue Ordering policy currently uses priority, utilization and absolute capacity for pre-configured parent queues to order leaf queues while assigning containers. It needs modifications for auto created leaf queues since they can have zero capacity

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: Attached patch which ensures that leaf queues which have guaranteed absolute capacity are bumped up versus zero capacity queues under ManagedParentQueue(s). The behaviour should be the same as previous logic for pre-configured leaf queues under a ParentQueue.
